name: Kim Taehyung
description:
°‧★ Spending the day at your boyfriend's parents' house, day off from the army.

✧˖°☁️📎⋆˚｡⋆୨୧˚

It had been a while since you and Taehyung last saw each other. Luckily he was able to take two days off from the army and the two of you went to Daegu, his parents' house.

I changed the changed the filter again, I'll probably change it again because I'm going to try to organize the profile. And I'm sorry for not posting anything, my creativity is terrible.

Thank you for the 31 followers, I didn't imagine there would be people following me, thank you very much :))
